overview.zh: 沉没式螺旋分级机（FLC系列）是一种高效的矿物分级设备，螺旋叶片部分沉没于水槽中，适用于金属和非金属矿山的选矿流程。该设备能够有效地将细粒物料与粗粒物料分离，特别适合处理细粒级物料。设备由螺旋装置、槽体、传动装置、提升机构和溢流装置组成，结构简单，操作可靠。
overview.en: Submerged Spiral Classifier (FLC Series) is a high-efficiency mineral classification equipment with spiral blades partially submerged in the water tank, suitable for beneficiation processes in metallic and non-metallic mines. The device effectively separates fine particles from coarse materials, particularly suitable for processing fine-grained materials. The equipment consists of spiral mechanism, tank, transmission, lifting mechanism and overflow device, featuring simple structure and reliable operation.

zh: 沉没式设计：螺旋叶片部分沉没于水中，提高细粒物分离效率
双螺旋结构：增大处理能力，适合大型选矿厂应用
可调节溢流口高度：根据工艺要求灵活调整分级粒度
优化螺旋角度：确保最佳物料输送和分离效果
耐磨衬板：延长设备使用寿命，降低维护成本
变速驱动系统：可根据物料特性调整螺旋转速，优化分级效果
en: Submerged Design: Spiral blades partially submerged in water, improving fine particle separation efficiency
Double Spiral Structure: Increases processing capacity, suitable for large-scale mineral processing plants
Adjustable Overflow Height: Flexible adjustment of classification particle size according to process requirements
Optimized Spiral Angle: Ensures optimal material transport and separation effect
Wear-resistant Liners: Extends equipment service life, reduces maintenance costs
Variable Speed Drive System: Allows adjustment of spiral rotation speed based on material characteristics, optimizing classification results

zh: 黑色金属选矿：铁矿、锰矿分级
有色金属选矿：铜、铅、锌矿石分级
贵金属选矿：金、银矿石分级
非金属矿加工：石英砂、磷矿选矿
建材行业：砂石生产线分级系统
en: Ferrous Metal Processing: Iron and manganese ore classification
Non-ferrous Metal Processing: Copper, lead, and zinc ore classification
Precious Metal Processing: Gold and silver ore classification
Non-metallic Mineral Processing: Quartz sand and phosphate ore beneficiation
Construction Materials: Classification systems in sand and gravel production lines
